parsed.recommendation_text: For commuting, the Sony WH-CH710N offers a solid balance of features and value. With good noise cancellation, a comfortable over-ear design, and an impressive 50-hour battery life, it's ideal for long commutes without breaking the budget. The mid-range price point aligns well with your sensitivity to cost while still delivering Sony quality. Its multipoint connectivity ensures seamless switching between devices, enhancing usability during busy commutes.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances features and value; good noise cancellation; longest battery life.
